title: Minecraft Dungeons Emerald Pickup Sound
description: Replaces the pickup sound with the MCD's emerald collection sfx
body:
It simply replaces the "pop" sound with the Minecraft Dungeons emerald collection sound effect. + Adds random variations to the sound.

Uses 6 sounds from MCDs, which all of them were took from the minecraft wiki Dungeons: Emerald page: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Emerald#Sounds

1. Sfx_item_emeraldCollect-001_soundWave
2. Sfx_item_emerald_rightcollect-001
3. Sfx_item_emerald_rightcollect-002
4. Sfx_item_emerald_rightcollect-003
5. Sfx_item_emerald_rightcollect-004
6. Sfx_item_emerald_rightcollect-005

Here's a showcase: 

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xm2L6Wu8CSE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xm2L6Wu8CSE)
